read.description: Read files and return their contents

write.description: Create new files or overwrite existing ones

grep.description: Search file contents using regular expressions

kiro.name: shell
kiro.autoAllowReadonly: When enabled, read-only commands are allowed without prompting. This parameter does not restrict write actions.

code.description: Provides code intelligence capabilities including symbol search, LSP integration, and pattern-based code search and rewriting

todo.description: Create and manage ToDo lists for tracking multi-step tasks

thinking.description: An internal reasoning mechanism that improves the quality of complex tasks by breaking them down into atomic actions

introspect.description: Provides self-awareness by answering questions about the CLI's features, commands, and functionality using official documentation.

subagent.description: Delegate complex tasks to specialized subagents

question.description: Ask the user questions during execution

context7.description: MCP, Get the latest documentation and code into Cursor, Claude, or other LLMs

deepwiki.description: MCP, Provides programmatic access to DeepWiki public repository documentation and search capabilities

exa.description: MCP, Powering agents with fast, high-quality web search

external_directory.description: Allow tool calls that touch paths outside the working directory

includeMcpJson.description: When enabled it will look for the mcp json configuration file for the server config
